data.name: Futa Spell
data.detailed_description:
Futa Spell is an adult visual novel with a fantasy setting.
Shanja and her adventure companion Rile, are on their way to the tower of Niagon. Their mission is to defeat Queen Daena. Will they succeed in their quest? Will they be able to defend themselves from the terrible and dark power of the fearsome witch?

Features:
Kinetic visual novel.
Two variations on the story.
Over 10,000 words of story.
Contains approximately 350 CG artworks in 1920x1080 format.
Original soundtrack.
Original fx.

data.short_description: Futa Spell is a futanari adult visual novel with a fantasy setting. Will Princess Shanja be able to defeat the evil Daena?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
